name: Sumo Deadlift
setup: Feet wide (just inside plates), toes out 30-45 degrees
Back neutral, hips closer to bar than conventional
execution: Push floor away, keeping chest up
Lock out with glutes at top
common_mistakes: Bar too far from body at start
cues: Open your t-shirt with your knees
Show your crotch to the wall (hips through)
Bar over mid-foot, pull into hips
advantages: Shorter range of motion than conventional
Less lower back stress for many
